Button.base: relative overflow-hidden font-bold uppercase tracking-wider transition-all duration-300

variants.outline: bg-transparent border border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary/10 hover:text-white hover:border-white
variants.glitch: bg-black text-primary border border-primary hover:bg-primary hover:text-black relative before:content-[''] before:absolute before:inset-0 before:bg-primary/20 before:translate-x-full hover:before:translate-x-0 before:transition-transform

Card.base: bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 p-6 relative group overflow-hidden
Card.decoration: after:absolute after:top-0 after:right-0 after:w-20 after:h-20 after:bg-gradient-to-bl after:from-primary/10 after:to-transparent after:opacity-0 group-hover:after:opacity-100 transition-opacity

Input.base: bg-black/50 border-b-2 border-white/20 focus:border-primary text-white placeholder:text-white/30 rounded-none px-4 py-3 outline-none transition-colors font-mono

StatusBadge.online: bg-green-500/10 text-green-500 border border-green-500/20 px-3 py-1 text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-wider
StatusBadge.offline: bg-red-500/10 text-red-500 border border-red-500/20 px-3 py-1 text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-wider
StatusBadge.queue: bg-yellow-500/10 text-yellow-500 border border-yellow-500/20 px-3 py-1 text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-wider

universal_guidelines: Always use the 'Neon Green' (#39FF14) as the primary accent color.
Backgrounds must be very dark (#050505), never pure black unless for contrast.
Use 'Orbitron' font for all headings to give a futuristic/gaming feel.
Implement a 'scanline' or 'noise' texture overlay on the background for immersion.
Buttons should be rectangular with sharp edges (rounded-none or rounded-sm).
Forms should feel like a 'terminal' or 'system access' interface.
Adhere to the 'Bento Grid' layout for the dashboard.
Ensure high contrast for text (White on Black).
Add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements.
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup Tailwind config with the custom colors and fonts defined above.
3. Create a 'Layout' component that includes the background texture and global styles.
4. Build the 'Hero' section using the hero_bg image and a heavy gradient overlay.
5. Use the 'Card' component style for all dashboard widgets.
6. Prioritize the 'Queue' visualization - make it look like a system process list.
7. Ensure the Steam Login button is prominent and uses the Steam brand colors (or a neon variant).
